content_body: Another great adventure with the Fab 5! We spent three nights here instead of two and it was perfect! This is a wonderful cabin to accommodate all of us and has everything we need to cook fabulous breakfasts and dinners. This has sentimental value for another reason. Two weekends my daughter became engaged to a wonderful man. May they have a long and loving life together. Love them both!
title: Fab Five Getaway #2!
